rulings.Case Title: JOHN VINDEDAHL VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR FRIDAY, AUGUST 4, 2006. DEFENDANT UNION CARBIDE CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. AS TO FIRST AND SECOND CAUSES OF ACTION TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT EXIST AS TO EXPOSURE OF HAMILTON RED DOT. AS TO MOTION TO SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED AS TO FALSE REPRESENTATION AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RAISE TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. =(302/REQ/HE)
